message:
fix(security): migrate all hashing to domain-separated SHA-256 and fix correctness bugs across 145 modules

This commit addresses a systemic security weakness: the codebase used
std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher and XOR-based hashing for
integrity digests, signatures, and content addressing. DefaultHasher is
non-cryptographic, non-deterministic across Rust versions, and lacks
domain separation — enabling cross-context collision attacks where a
digest valid in one subsystem could be replayed in another.

Hashing migration (affects ~100 modules):
- All DefaultHasher usages replaced with sha2::Sha256
- All XOR-based hash computations replaced with proper SHA-256
- Every hash site now includes a versioned domain separator prefix
  (e.g. "lease_coord_hash_v1:", "trust_fabric_v1:",
  "anti_entropy_record_v1:", "eviction_saga_content_v1:", etc.)
- Integer fields serialized with explicit .to_le_bytes() instead of
  relying on Hash trait (which is not guaranteed to be stable)
- Field separators ("|" or null bytes) added between concatenated
  values to prevent length-extension ambiguity

Key module areas migrated:
- connector: lease_coordinator, trust_fabric, canonical_serializer,
  rollback_bundle, state_model, incident_bundle_retention, saga,
  transport_fault_gate, and 25+ more
- control_plane: fork_detection, evidence_replay_gate, root_pointer,
  epoch_transition_barrier
- runtime: anti_entropy (full root recomputation), cancellable_task,
  incident_lab, time_travel, checkpoint, obligation_channel
- security: threshold_sig, barrier_primitives, remote_cap, sybil_defense,
  zk_attestation, epoch_scoped_keys, decision_receipt
- remote: idempotency_store, eviction_saga, remote_bulkhead
- supply_chain: transparency_verifier, quarantine, artifact_signing,
  provenance, migration_kit
- observability: durability_violation, evidence_ledger
- encoding: deterministic_seed (now tracks version alongside config hash)
- vef: constraint_compiler, sdk_integration, proof_generator,
  proof_verifier, receipt_chain
- tools: 25+ metrics/reporting modules updated for hash compatibility

Correctness bug fixes bundled with the migration:
- incident_bundle_retention: Cold→Archive tier transition now uses
  time_in_tier instead of absolute age; adds last_tier_change_epoch field
- rollback_bundle: adds reverse manifest check (components must be in
  manifest), prune() now removes oldest by timestamp not lex-first key,
  rollback failure now reverts state to pre-snapshot
- eviction_saga: cancel_saga() guards against cancelling terminal/
  compensating sagas, crash_recover_saga() now actually applies
  compensation actions instead of just logging them
- idempotency_store: Complete entry with missing outcome no longer
  panics via .expect(), instead fails closed with CorruptComplete action
  and new ERR_IDEMPOTENCY_CORRUPT_ENTRY error code
- fork_detection: DivergenceDetector no longer auto-clears halted flag
  on convergence (only operator_reset() clears halt), epoch arithmetic
  uses saturating_add, RollbackDetector rejects backward/same-epoch
  state vectors, fixes missing assert!() on matches!() result
- cancellable_task: all_closed logic was inverted (treated non-empty
  obligations as all-closed regardless of state)
- zk_attestation: off-by-one expiry boundary fix (now_ms < expires_at_ms
  instead of <=), consistent across verify/is_valid/sweep_expired
- state_model: now_iso8601() outputs proper ISO-8601 dates using
  Howard Hinnant civil_from_days algorithm instead of bare epoch seconds
- deterministic_seed: DeterministicSeedDeriver tracks version alongside
  config hash, old_version taken from stored value

Robustness improvements:
- ~40 instances of .unwrap() replaced with .expect() providing context
  messages across quarantine, eviction_saga, durability_violation,
  idempotency_store, and other modules
- conformance/fsqlite_inspired_suite: >= threshold assertions tightened
  to exact == assertions with drift messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -537,8 +537,8 @@ impl FleetControlManager {
                 zone_id: scope.zone_id.clone(),
                 active_quarantines: 0,
                 active_revocations: 0,
-                healthy_nodes: 10,
-                total_nodes: 10,
+                healthy_nodes: 0,
+                total_nodes: 0,
                 activated: true,
                 pending_convergences: Vec::new(),
             });

@@ -167,8 +167,8 @@ fn gate_event(code: &str, level: &str, trace_id: &str, message: String) -> GateE
 
 fn lower_risk_than_blocked(blocked: HealthDelta, candidate: HealthDelta) -> bool {
     candidate.cascade_risk_delta < blocked.cascade_risk_delta
-        || candidate.new_fragility_findings < blocked.new_fragility_findings
-        || candidate.new_articulation_points < blocked.new_articulation_points
+        && candidate.new_fragility_findings < blocked.new_fragility_findings
+        && candidate.new_articulation_points < blocked.new_articulation_points
 }
 
 pub fn suggest_replans(
